mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.medium_category AS value FROM new_category c WHERE c.large_category = #{largeCategory} ORDER BY c.medium_category
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM new_expense_info e INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = e.category_id

SELECT e.id AS id, c.large_category AS largeCategory, c.medium_category AS mediumCategory, c.small_category AS smallCategory, e.expense_type AS expenseType, e.description AS description, e.unit_cost AS unitCost, e.quantity AS quantity, e.total_cost AS totalCost, e.expense_date AS expenseDate, e.expense_time AS expenseTime, e.created_at AS createdAt, e.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM new_expense_info e INNER JOIN new_category c ON c.id = e.category_id
ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{req.limit} OFFSET #{req.offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_expense_info ( expense_date, expense_time, category_id, expense_type, unit_cost, quantity, total_cost, description ) VALUES ( #{expenseDate}, #{expenseTime}, #{categoryId}, #{expenseType}, #{unitCost}, #{quantity}, #{totalCost}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE new_expense_info SET category_id = #{categoryId}, expense_date = #{expenseDate}, expense_time = #{expenseTime}, expense_type = #{expenseType}, unit_cost = #{unitCost}, quantity = #{quantity}, total_cost = #{totalCost}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
